---
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

![](TrinityMetrics_DetailedImage.png){fig-align="left" width="330"}

TrinityMetrics explores how biostatisticians, pharmacometricians, and clinical data scientists can use modern AI tools while maintaining accountability, reproducibility, and data integrity. It contains:

* [Blog](blog/index.qmd): mainly about tools for making GenAI-assisted analysis more transparent and reproducible.
* [Code](code.qmd): reusable scripts, templates, and utilities that support practical work.
* [Resources](resources.qmd): documents, checklists, and implementation-oriented materials that support reviewable work.
